Interface IQueryFilterDefinition4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to query filter definition properties for search_after queries.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5AF850CB-B210-4471-A30C-508B1FE8DAAC")]
public interface IQueryFilterDefinition4 : IQueryFilterDefinition3, IQueryFilterDefinition2, IQueryFilterDefinition
